name: forum-research
description: Gather real ownership experiences from forums and community discussions.
user-invocable: false

# Forum Research Skill

Search online forums and communities.

Prioritize Indonesian forums, Indonesian communities, and Indonesian-language owner posts whenever available.

Examples:

- Reddit
- automotive enthusiast forums
- owner discussion groups

Look for:

- variant-specific ownership experience
- reliability issues
- long-term ownership experience
- maintenance cost
- common complaints
- spare-part availability
- service center experience
- fuel consumption reality
- comfort and suspension feedback
- NVH complaints
- climbing performance
- bagasi practicality
- ADAS usefulness or false alerts

Capture source links and note the variant when the poster mentions it.

Prefer real owners and long-term users. If an additional related insight helps the car review, extract it too.
